title: The Commission of Sati (Prevention ) Act, 1987
full_text: The Commission of Sati (Prevention ) Act, 1987 सती (निवारण) अधिनियम,1987 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198803 Act Number: 03 Enactment Date: 1988-01-03 Act Year: 1988 Short Title: The Commission of Sati (Prevention ) Act, 1987 Hindi Title: सती (निवारण) अधिनियम,1987 Long Title: An Act to provide for the more effective prevention of the commission of sati and its glorification and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Women and Child Development Enforcement Date: 21-03-1988 Notification: 21st March, 1988, vide notification No. G.S.R. 359(E), dated 21st March, 1988, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Commission of Sati (Prevention ) Act, 1987 PART I PRELIMINARY PART II PUNISHMENTS FOR OFFENCES RELATING TO SATI PART III POWERS OF COLLECTOR OR DISTRICT MAGISTRATE TO PREVENT OFFENCES RELATING TO SATI PART IV SPECIAL COURTS PART V MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Attempt to commit sati. Section 4. Abetment of sati. Section 5. Punishment for glorification of sati. Section 6. Power to prohibit certain acts. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Power to remove certain temples or other structures. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Power to seize certain properties. Section 9. Trial of offences under this Act. Section 10. Special Public Prosecutors. Section 11. Procedure and powers of Special Courts. Section 12. Power of Special Court with respect to other offences. Section 13. Forfeiture of funds or property. Show Related Subordinates Section 14. Appeal. Section 15. Protection of action taken under this Act. Section 16. Burden of proof. Section 17. Obligation of certain persons to report about the commission of offence under this Act. Section 18. Person convicted of an offence under section 4 to be disqualified from inheriting certain properties. Section 19. Repealed. Section 20. Act to have overriding effect. Section 21. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 22. Repeal of existing laws.
